title: polygala dunensis var. ciliata
intro: Polygala dunensis var. ciliata, also known as Cilicate Polygala, is a variant of the Polygala dunensis plant, a flowering perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala dunensis var. ciliata are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
